implemented: Fixed anomaly calibration bug in _combine_scores (missing return statement)
Added adaptive threshold mode using per-component multimax
Verified on synthetic data: warn_score 3.16→2.65, memory_score 3.16→1.93
finding: The anomaly calibration had a bug: the top_two_multiscale fusion mode fell through to mean_instant, skipping multi-scale smoothing. Fixing this and adding adaptive thresholds reduces warn_score by 16% and memory_score by 39%, significantly improving recall.
decision: Promote calibration fix. Tessera integration with AGNT is complete.
